name: Swiss IKB
description: Swiss International Style. Ultra-thin 200-weight Inter / Helvetica, crisp warm-white canvas, IKB (International Klein Blue) as the single high-saturation accent. Signature: 1px hairline grid + 200-weight hero numbers. Massimo Vignelli + Helvetica Forever energy.
descriptionZh: 瑞士国际主义风。**极细 200 weight** Inter / Helvetica + 净暖白底 + 克莱因蓝（IKB）单一锚点色。签名：1px 发丝网格 + 200 重字 hero 数字。Massimo Vignelli / Helvetica Forever 那种克制冷静。
bestFor: 年度总结 / 数据汇报
